text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's training in preparation for the
Mainichi Hai has been coming along smoothly.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... How's my time?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Great!
choice_data_list:
I'd like you to do another run and focus more on
your lap times.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Understood.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki turns around and suddenly stops in
her tracks. I follow the direction of her gaze to
see...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... My legs feel as heavy as bricks... I gotta
build more muscle strength...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to work out more. So for going uphill...
Ah, maybe my abs and back muscles are too
weak...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I move laterally too, will my momentum will add
to my speed?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll try going uphill again, but diagonally
this time!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: It's Chiyono O.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. She was so disappointed after performing
poorly recently. She must be trying to rectify the
issues she had.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's reflected on her race, determined
what needs to be improved on, and applied those
changes in training...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And now she's analyzing each lap she ran during
practice to discern further flaws that require
improvement...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
To be able to take this analysis and set new goals
instead of aimlessly running an endless number of
laps...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Her ability to face her own weaknesses so boldly
and improving upon them is remarkable.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What exceptional mental fortitude.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
In martial arts, we also believe that diligent effort
will ultimately give rise to great growth.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: She is not to be taken lightly.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... I knew it'd be difficult to grasp the timing
for the last spurt just by doing mental
visualizations...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hiya, Chiyo! ♪ Why the scrunchy face?
Something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, Maruzen! Ah, uh... No, I'm doing just fine!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
See, this is why I can never let you be. You remind
me of myself in that respect.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Anyhoo, you're looking for someone to run with,
right? I can help you out with that! But be
warned—I'm a real speed demon!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huh?! How could you tell?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, you were right on my tail at the race the
other day, but you just couldn't quite overtake
me, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Since it's you we're talking about, I figured you'd
probably be out here trying to figure out a way to
overcome that roadblock!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, you're spot on! But... are you sure
you're okay running with me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Totally! You've accepted the dream I entrusted to
you and are always working so hard to achieve
it...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Of course I want to help out!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Wow, thanks a million!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Sakura Chiyono O and Maruzensky,
also known as the Hot Rod, are going to run
together.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky possesses a wealth of experience
with the Twinkle Series, so there's much that can
be learned from running with her.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen has a talent for looking after others. No
doubt running with her will help open Chiyono O's
eyes to her own weaknesses.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And that will surely lead to her overcoming them
and becoming even stronger!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I can't afford to be sitting around! I'm going for
another run!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After she's done at the track, we move to the gym
and come across another familiar face.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Phew... This is my limit, it seems...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Are you all right, Ardan? You don't look too well.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Yaeno. There's no need to worry about me.
I'm perfectly fine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
This is simply how I stop to catch my breath
whenever things feel a bit difficult.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: If you say so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's only natural that Yaeno Muteki is concerned.
Mejiro Ardan has been hospitalized a good
number of times because of her frail constitution.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I hear that's why her debut has been perpetually
delayed, though she's long since entered the
state of rapid growth known as being race-ready.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's always the risk that she'll be hospitalized
again if she were to put excessive strain on her
body.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I want to train every little bit that I can.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
If I were to idle the days away, I'd be unable to
catch up to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
You did say you'd make your debut this year no
matter what.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
So I did. Given how much time I've already wasted
since becoming race-ready...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
The amount of time I have left as a competitive
racer is increasingly meager compared to other
runners.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That's why I wish to use everything at my disposal
in order to successfully debut this year.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I would rather shine on the turf for just a moment,
no matter how brief it may be, than fade into
obscurity without having accomplished anything.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Everything I choose to do is done with careful
consideration, so please don't worry about me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having made such a resolute declaration, Mejiro
Ardan leaves to resume her training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What admirable determination!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
She's intent on running, even if it means risking
her life.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But I'm just as resolved as she is!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I must perfect control of the blaze fierce and
water still, and carve my victory in stone!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I'm counting on you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's rivals have ignited a fire inside
her, and the steady flames of that blaze can be
clearly seen in her eyes.
